tests.name: init creates THREE.Points mesh in scene
tests.description: createFlowRibbonField().init() adds exactly one THREE.Points child to the scene, confirming the system uses point-based rendering
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: mesh uses ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
tests.description: The Points mesh must use a ShaderMaterial with non-empty vertexShader and fragmentShader strings, confirming custom GLSL is wired up
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: vertex shader contains curl3 call for flow-field displacement
tests.description: The vertex shader source must contain a curl3 function call, confirming the flow-field displacement uses curl noise as specified in AC
accepts: A new vertex shader displaces points along curl noise flow-field lines

tests.name: vertex shader references uBassEnergy for flow speed modulation
tests.description: The vertex shader must reference uBassEnergy in a context that modulates the curl velocity (flow speed), confirming bass drives macro flow
accepts: Flow speed is modulated by bass energy

tests.name: vertex shader references uTrebleEnergy for turbulence modulation
tests.description: The vertex shader must reference uTrebleEnergy in a context that modulates turbulence/detail, confirming treble drives fine flow variation
accepts: Flow turbulence is modulated by treble energy

tests.name: fragment shader uses gl_PointCoord for elongated sprite rendering
tests.description: The fragment shader must reference gl_PointCoord and apply an elongation/stretch to create the tendril-like streak appearance
accepts: Points are rendered as elongated sprites aligned to their velocity direction

tests.name: vertex shader passes elongation varying to fragment shader
tests.description: The vertex shader must declare and write a vElongation varying derived from velocity magnitude, and the fragment shader must read it
accepts: Points are rendered as elongated sprites aligned to their velocity direction

tests.name: geometry has required attributes: position(3), color(3), aHueOffset(1), aRandom(3)
tests.description: FlowRibbonField uses the same attribute layout as RibbonField (position, color, aHueOffset, aRandom), confirming compatibility with existing systems
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: optional size attribute has itemSize 1 when present
tests.description: The optional size attribute should be present with itemSize 1, consistent with other point-based systems
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: all buffer attributes contain only finite values after init
tests.description: All geometry buffer arrays must contain only finite numeric values (no NaN, no Infinity) to prevent rendering artifacts
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: point positions have non-zero Z-depth confirming 3D distribution
tests.description: The geometry must have volumetric 3D distribution — Z values must span a meaningful range, not be flat on a plane
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: same seed produces same initial point configuration
tests.description: Deterministic seeding: identical seeds must produce identical initial geometry, ensuring reproducibility
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: different seeds produce different configurations
tests.description: Different seeds must produce different geometry distributions, confirming the PRNG varies with seed input
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: draw does not throw with valid FrameState
tests.description: The draw method must execute without errors given a standard valid FrameState
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: draw does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
tests.description: The system must handle zero-energy and missing pointer gracefully without throwing
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: draw does not throw at boundary parameter values
tests.description: The system must handle extreme boundary combinations (all zeros, all ones) without throwing
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: draw updates uBassEnergy uniform from frame params
tests.description: The draw method must propagate bassEnergy from FrameState params to the uBassEnergy shader uniform, confirming bass modulates flow speed at runtime
accepts: Flow speed is modulated by bass energy

tests.name: draw updates uTrebleEnergy uniform from frame params
tests.description: The draw method must propagate trebleEnergy from FrameState params to the uTrebleEnergy shader uniform, confirming treble modulates turbulence at runtime
accepts: Flow turbulence is modulated by treble energy

tests.name: bass and treble are mapped to distinct uniforms
tests.description: Setting bassEnergy=1 with trebleEnergy=0 and vice versa must independently update the correct uniforms, ensuring the two audio bands drive separate shader behaviors
accepts: Flow speed is modulated by bass energy
Flow turbulence is modulated by treble energy

tests.name: draw updates uTime uniform over successive frames
tests.description: The uTime uniform must change between frames, confirming the shader receives temporal progression for animation
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: material uses additive blending with transparency and depthWrite disabled
tests.description: The ShaderMaterial must use AdditiveBlending, transparent=true, depthWrite=false for the glowing tendril/aurora aesthetic
accepts: Visual character is distinctly different from existing warp shaders

tests.name: vertex shader is distinct from existing warp shaders (uses flow advection, not radial expansion)
tests.description: The flowRibbon vertex shader must NOT contain the same displacement pattern as existing shaders. It should use curl3 advection rather than fbm3+direction radial displacement or sinusoidal ribbon sway
accepts: Visual character is distinctly different from existing warp shaders

tests.name: init creates points based on density and maxPoints config
tests.description: Higher density must produce more points, and maxPoints config must cap the count, matching the adaptive counting pattern of other systems
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: cleanup removes mesh from scene and disposes geometry/material
tests.description: Calling cleanup() must remove the Points mesh from the scene and call dispose() on both geometry and material to prevent GPU memory leaks
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: setOpacity updates uOpacity uniform
tests.description: The setOpacity method must update the uOpacity uniform for cross-fade transitions in ModeManager
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: mesh rotation changes over elapsed time (Y-axis drift)
tests.description: The mesh must slowly rotate over time, providing organic drift consistent with other geometry systems
accepts: Visual character is distinctly different from existing warp shaders

tests.name: paletteHue is passed to GPU via uPaletteHue uniform
tests.description: The draw method must propagate paletteHue to the uPaletteHue shader uniform for GPU-side color computation
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: shader has uFlowScale uniform for advection strength control
tests.description: The ShaderMaterial must include a uFlowScale uniform to control the overall flow advection strength, a unique parameter for this shader variant
accepts: A new vertex shader displaces points along curl noise flow-field lines

tests.name: no localStorage or cookie access during flow ribbon operations
tests.description: Privacy gate: no storage APIs must be accessed during init or draw, consistent with the project's no-persistence policy
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: position buffer values are finite at boundary params
tests.description: Geometry must remain valid (all finite values) even at extreme parameter boundaries like density=0 or density=1
accepts: Shader compiles cleanly with no WebGL errors

tests.name: FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES registered in shaderRegistry
tests.description: shaderRegistry.ts must export FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES matching the RIBBONFIELD_ATTRIBUTES layout (position, color, aHueOffset, aRandom)
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: OPTIONAL_FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES includes size attribute
tests.description: shaderRegistry.ts must export OPTIONAL_FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES with a size(1) attribute spec
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: QualityProfile includes maxFlowRibbonPoints field
tests.description: The QualityProfile interface and computeQuality() must include maxFlowRibbonPoints with tier-appropriate values
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: flowribbon mode registered in ModeManager modes array
tests.description: The main.ts ModeManager setup must include a 'flowribbon' mode entry, confirming it participates in the mode rotation
accepts: Can be assigned to particleField or pointCloud systems

tests.name: fragment shader includes fog/depth attenuation
tests.description: The fragment shader must include atmospheric fog calculations (uFogNear/uFogFar) consistent with the ribbonWarp fragment shader pattern
accepts: Visual character is distinctly different from existing warp shaders

testFile.setup:
const defaultParams: VisualParams = {
  paletteHue: 180,
  paletteSaturation: 0.5,
  cadence: 0.7,
  density: 0.6,
  motionAmplitude: 1.0,
  pointerDisturbance: 0,
  bassEnergy: 0,
  trebleEnergy: 0,
  curveSoftness: 0.5,
  structureComplexity: 0.5,
  noiseFrequency: 1.0,
  radialScale: 1.0,
  twistStrength: 1.0,
  fieldSpread: 1.0,
};

function makeFrame(overrides?: Partial<FrameState>): FrameState {
  return {
    time: 1000,
    delta: 16,
    elapsed: 1000,
    width: 800,
    height: 600,
    params: { ...defaultParams },
    ...overrides,
  };
}

additionalTestFiles.note: Add T-063-31 and T-063-32 to existing shaderRegistry tests. Import FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES and OPTIONAL_FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES from shaderRegistry.
Add T-063-33 to existing quality tests. Import computeQuality and BrowserSignals.
